message.content:
★ Pharmacology ★
* General Pharmacology:-
- Factors affecting Bioavailability.
○ Route of Administration, Advantages & Disadvantages of Parenteral Route.
○ Competitive Antagonist.
○ Phase of Clinical Trial.
○ Factors affecting Drug Action – genetics, gender & age → explain in Detail.
- TDM.
- New Drug Delivery System.
○ GPCR
○ Drug Dependence
- Volume of Distribution.
○ t ½.
○ Management of Anaphylactic Shock.
- Describe type of Antagonism with examples.
○ PPB
○ First Pass Metabolism.
○ Therapeutic Drug Monitoring.
- Clinical status of Drug in Disease.
○ Pharmacovigilance.
- Agent causing Allergic Reaction & Drug induced Anaphylaxis & its Reaction.
○ Define ® & ® Regulating gene expression.
- Define Biotransformation & Enzyme Induction Inhibition with examples
- Adverse Drug effects.
- Teratogenicity
- Drug Tolerance
- Therapeutic Index
- Zero order Kinetics
